caption: A man with a dark complexion wears a green baseball cap, large black over-ear headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT". He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with framed photos on the wall behind him and a white mannequin wearing a white long-sleeved shirt in the background. A professional black microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth open and his facial expression shifting slightly. He gestures with his right hand, moving it from a neutral position to a raised motion. In the lower corners of the scene, two logos are visible: a black circle containing "THE" and "RADIO" and a red text logo that reads "BELLY".
